overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a medieval stone fortress approach at night, transitioning to a foggy open field. The character moves along dirt paths past stone walls and ruins under a dark teal sky with visible stars, approaching an illuminated stone gatehouse before the scene cuts to a misty landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortress approach path with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant stone fortress, passing low stone walls on either side

entered.detail: dark silhouetted mountains against the night sky
low stacked stone wall running alongside the path
low stacked stone wall on the right side of the path
unpaved dirt trail winding through the landscape
large fortified stone structure with arched entrance becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path flanked by low stone walls, approaching a distant stone fortress under a starry night sky. The landscape is open with mountains visible on the horizon, and the path leads steadily toward the illuminated gatehouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone fortress entrance with arched gateway

events.description: approaching the warm orange glow emanating from the arched doorway

agents.ego_description: walking closer to the stone gatehouse, passing alongside the thick fortress walls toward the illuminated entrance

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the main entrance to the fortress
warm orange light glowing from within the gatehouse entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the imposing stone gatehouse, drawing near to the arched entrance that emits a warm orange glow. The fortress walls rise on the left while the right side opens up, and the path leads directly toward the illuminated doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy open field with stone walls

events.description: abrupt transition from stone fortress to foggy open landscape with severely reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: walking through the dense fog along a dirt path, visibility limited to nearby stone walls and the immediate path ahead

entered.detail: dense fog covering the open landscape, obscuring distant details
broken wooden fence posts alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to a foggy open field where visibility is severely limited. The character continues walking along a dirt path flanked by low stone walls and broken wooden fences, with only the immediate surroundings visible through the thick mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a clear, starry night approach toward a fortress into a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded field. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by low stone walls, moving steadily toward a distant stone fortress under a vast sky with mountains on the horizon. As the camera draws closer, the scene focuses on an imposing stone gatehouse where the darkness gives way to a warm orange glow emanating from the arched entrance. The environment then shifts abruptly into a dense, misty landscape where visibility is severely limited. The camera continues forward along a dirt path lined with broken wooden fences, with the open night sky replaced by a thick, enveloping fog.
